message:
fix(security): stop leaking internal error details in mail_ui HTTP responses

Replace verbose error messages exposed to HTTP clients with generic
responses. DB errors, panic messages, and template rendering failures
now log full details server-side via tracing::error! while returning
only "Internal server error" or "Not found" to the caller. This
prevents information disclosure of internal stack traces, DB schema
details, and panic payloads through the web UI endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
